news.headline: Yemen’s Houthis launch ballistic missile at Israel as Middle East conflict escalates
news.summary: Yemen’s Houthi rebels fired a ballistic missile towards Israel on Saturday, marking their entry into the intensifying Middle East war. The move comes amid rising regional tensions, US-Israeli airstrikes on Iran, and disruptions to Red Sea shipping that threaten global trade and energy markets.
